analysis.summary: Keycloak is an open-source identity and access management server that provides user authentication, authorization, and federation services. It processes authentication requests, manages user identities, and integrates with applications via SAML, OAuth2/OIDC protocols.
capabilities: Processes SAML authentication requests and generates responses (adapters/saml/core/src/main/java/org/keycloak/adapters/saml/SamlAuthenticator.java)
Manages user sessions and session stores (adapters/saml/core/src/main/java/org/keycloak/adapters/saml/SamlSessionStore.java)
Provides role mapping and authorization services (adapters/saml/core/src/main/java/org/keycloak/adapters/saml/RoleMappingsProvider.java)
Handles single sign-on (SSO) and single logout (SLO) flows (adapters/saml/core/src/main/java/org/keycloak/adapters/saml/profile/webbrowsersso/WebBrowserSsoAuthenticationHandler.java)
Parses and validates SAML configuration and metadata (adapters/saml/core/src/main/java/org/keycloak/adapters/saml/config/parsers/KeycloakSamlAdapterParser.java)
Implements cryptographic key rotation and management (adapters/saml/core/src/main/java/org/keycloak/adapters/saml/rotation/SamlDescriptorPublicKeyLocator.java)
Provides client adapters for Java EE/Jakarta EE applications (adapters/saml/wildfly-elytron/src/main/java/org/keycloak/adapters/saml/elytron/ElytronSamlAuthenticator.java)
integrations: External identity providers via SAML metadata

functional_dna.logic_archetype_evidence: Processes SAML authentication requests and generates responses (SamlAuthenticator.java), provides role mapping and authorization services (RoleMappingsProvider.java), handles single sign-on (SSO) and single logout (SLO) flows
functional_dna.data_contract_evidence: SAML 2.0 Protocol Implementation with strict XML schema validation, parses and validates SAML configuration and metadata (KeycloakSamlAdapterParser.java)
functional_dna.core_algorithmic_evidence: Manages user sessions and session stores (SamlSessionStore.java), user identity management with database storage, session lifecycle operations
functional_dna.concurrency_evidence: Multi-threaded Java server with synchronous request processing, clustering support mentioned, session management across distributed instances
functional_dna.repurposing_reasoning: High confidence due to standard protocol implementations (SAML, OAuth2/OIDC) and modular adapter architecture. The authentication/authorization patterns are universally applicable across industries, with well-defined interfaces and extensible plugin system.
